name_en: Academy of Persian Language and Literature
description: The Academy of Persian Language and Literature (Farhangestan-e Zaban va Adab-e Farsi) is Iran's official language-regulatory body, tasked with preserving and developing the Persian language. It coins Persian equivalents for foreign terms and oversees linguistic standards. [Gholam-Ali Haddad-Adel](/people/gholam-ali-haddad-adel) has served as its president since 1995.
